<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.bcdk.BCDKConfigurationInfo"> 
  <void property="JCAAdapterConfig"> 
   <string><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ESBAdapterConfigurations>
    <ConnectionLess>false</ConnectionLess>
    <isConfigurationRequired>true</isConfigurationRequired>
    <isLicensed>false</isLicensed>
    <Inbound>false</Inbound>
    <AdapterInstanceProperties><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ESBAdapterInstanceProperties"> 
  <void property="GUID"> 
   <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appName"> 
   <string>MOBILEBANKING_V3</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="domain"> 
   <string>BCConfigPropertySheet</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="instanceName"> 
   <string>WebServiceConsumer1</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="logCategories"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>WSInvokerInteractionSpec</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription">

   <void method="put">

   </void>

</java> 
]]></AdapterInstanceProperties>

        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.spi.outbound.WSInvokerManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="JNDIName"> 
    <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1100</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="httpAuthConfiguration"> 
    <void property="password" isEncrypted="true"> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="username"> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>MOBILEBANKING_V3__WebServiceConsumer1</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="sslConfiguration"> 
    <void property="acceptServerCertificate"> 
     <boolean>true</boolean> 
    </void> 
    <void property="ignoreHostnameMismatch"> 
     <boolean>true</boolean> 
    </void> 
    <void property="keyClientPassword" isEncrypted="true"> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="keyStoreLocation"> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="keyStorePassword" isEncrypted="true"> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="trustStoreLocation"> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="trustStorePassword" isEncrypted="true"> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="useSSL"> 
     <boolean>true</boolean> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="wsdl"> 
    <object class="com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.model.WSDLInfo"> 
     <void property="wsdlURL"> 
      <string>https://utap.cambodiapostbank.com.kh:7002/CPBAPI/services?wsdl</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsReconnection</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>WSInvoker Connection</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>wsinvoker.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.spi.outbound.WSInvokerManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.spi.ManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>

    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="endpointAddress"> 
    <string>https://utap.cambodiapostbank.com.kh:7002/CPBAPI/services</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorActionsMap"> 
     <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>2</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID">

          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>3</int>

        </void>

      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>1</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="active"> 
           <boolean>true</boolean> 
          </void> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="noOfRetries"> 
           <int>10</int> 
          </void> 
          <void property="repeatInterval"> 
           <long>300000</long> 
          </void> 
          <void property="sendErrorAfterTries"> 
           <int>2</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error">

        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"/> 
      </void> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>MOBILEBANKING_V3__WebServiceConsumer1</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="jndiConfiguration"> 
    <void property="password" isEncrypted="true"> 
     <string>CVuEpOIpQJAIVeUQIs7kBQ==</string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="operationInputParam"> 
    <string>input</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="operationName"> 
    <string>WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="operationOutputParam"> 
    <string>output</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="portName"> 
    <string>T24WebServicesImplPort</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="properties"> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>TargetNamespace.Prefix</string> 
     <string>tns</string> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>javax.xml.rpc.soap.operation.style</string> 
     <string>wrapped</string> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>SOAP.version</string> 
     <string>http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/</string> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>javax.xml.rpc.soap.http.soapaction.uri</string> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="service"> 
    <string>{http://temenos.com/CPBAPI}T24WebServicesImplService</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="soapBodyNS"> 
    <string>http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>WebService</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsReconnection</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void>

    <InputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="importedStructures"> 
   <object class="java.util.HashMap"> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string></string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:ns1=&quot;http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;webRequestCommon&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;company&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;password&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;userName&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;enquiryInput&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;enquiryInputCollection&quot; type=&quot;tns:enquiryInputCollection&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:simpleType name=&quot;successIndicator&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:restriction base=&quot;xsd:string&quot;&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;Success&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;TWSError&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;T24Error&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;T24Override&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;T24Offline&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:restriction&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:simpleType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Status&quot; type=&quot;tns:Status&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WebRequestCommon&quot; type=&quot;tns:webRequestCommon&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType&quot; type=&quot;tns:enquiryInput&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;Status&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;transactionId&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;messageId&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;successIndicator&quot; type=&quot;tns:successIndicator&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;application&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;messages&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;enquiryInputCollection&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;columnName&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;criteriaValue&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;operand&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse&quot; type=&quot;tns:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot; type=&quot;tns:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot;/&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
      </void> 
     </object> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK</string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:tns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;HDRLINE11&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;HDRLINE21&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;HDRLINE22&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;HDRLINE3&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;DACC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;CUS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;SPACE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;PRTNM&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;CHKCCY&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;BFWD&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;OPENINGBALANCE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;DBAL&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;ClosingBalance&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;ZERORECORDS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;gCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKDetailType&quot;&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                        &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;mCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKDetailType&quot;&gt;&#13;
                            &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                                &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Account&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;BookingDate&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;BookDate&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Reference&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Description&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Narrative&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;ValueDate&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Debit&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Credit&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;ClosingBalance&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                                &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;m&quot; type=&quot;xsd:positiveInteger&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                            &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                        &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;g&quot; type=&quot;xsd:positiveInteger&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
      </void> 
     </object> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array</string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;?xml version=&apos;1.0&apos; encoding=&apos;UTF-8&apos;?&gt;&lt;!-- Published by JAX-WS RI (http://jax-ws.java.net). RI&apos;s version is JAX-WS RI 2.3.0-wls122140-b190328.0053 svn-revision#unknown. --&gt;&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:ns0=&quot;http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;anyTypeArray&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;item&quot; type=&quot;xsd:anyType&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; nillable=&quot;true&quot;/&gt;&lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
      </void> 
     </object> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>http://temenos.com/CPBAPI</string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;?xml version=&apos;1.0&apos; encoding=&apos;UTF-8&apos;?&gt;&lt;!-- Published by JAX-WS RI (http://jax-ws.java.net). xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:import schemaLocation=&quot;https://utap.cambodiapostbank.com.kh:7002/CPBAPI/services?xsd=2&quot; type=&quot;ns0:Status&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType&quot; type=&quot;ns1:CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot;/&gt;&lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;webRequestCommon&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;company&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;password&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;userName&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;enquiryInput&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;enquiryInputCollection&quot; type=&quot;ns0:enquiryInputCollection&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; nillable=&quot;true&quot;/&gt;&lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;enquiryInputCollection&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;columnName&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;Status&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;transactionId&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;messageId&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;successIndicator&quot; type=&quot;ns0:successIndicator&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;application&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;messages&quot;       </void> 
     </object> 
    </void> 
   </object> 
  </void> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Envelope</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/&quot; xmlns:wsp=&quot;http://www.w3.org/ns/ws-policy&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot; xmlns:wsp1_2=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy&quot; xmlns:wsu=&quot;http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; xmlns:soap=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/&quot; xmlns:wsam=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata&quot; xmlns:ftns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI/WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK/Input&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI/WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK/Input&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Envelope&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;ftns:Header&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;ftns:Body&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Header&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Body&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;tns:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://temenos.com/CPBAPI/WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK/Input</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></InputRecordDefinition>
    <OutputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="importedStructures"> 
   <object class="java.util.HashMap"> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string></string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:ns1=&quot;http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;webRequestCommon&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;company&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;password&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;userName&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;enquiryInput&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;enquiryInputCollection&quot; type=&quot;tns:enquiryInputCollection&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:simpleType name=&quot;successIndicator&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:restriction base=&quot;xsd:string&quot;&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;Success&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;TWSError&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;T24Error&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;T24Override&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:enumeration value=&quot;T24Offline&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:restriction&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:simpleType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Status&quot; type=&quot;tns:Status&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WebRequestCommon&quot; type=&quot;tns:webRequestCommon&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType&quot; type=&quot;tns:enquiryInput&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;Status&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;transactionId&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;messageId&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;successIndicator&quot; type=&quot;tns:successIndicator&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;application&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;messages&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;enquiryInputCollection&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;columnName&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;criteriaValue&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;operand&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse&quot; type=&quot;tns:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot; type=&quot;tns:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot;/&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
      </void> 
     </object> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK</string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:tns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;HDRLINE11&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;HDRLINE21&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;HDRLINE22&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;HDRLINE3&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;DACC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;CUS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;SPACE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;PRTNM&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;CHKCCY&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;BFWD&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;OPENINGBALANCE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;DBAL&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;ClosingBalance&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;ZERORECORDS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;gCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKDetailType&quot;&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                        &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;mCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKDetailType&quot;&gt;&#13;
                            &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                                &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Account&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;BookingDate&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;BookDate&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Reference&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Description&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Narrative&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;ValueDate&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Debit&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;Credit&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                    &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;ClosingBalance&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                                &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                                &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;m&quot; type=&quot;xsd:positiveInteger&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                            &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                        &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;g&quot; type=&quot;xsd:positiveInteger&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
      </void> 
     </object> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array</string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;?xml version=&apos;1.0&apos; encoding=&apos;UTF-8&apos;?&gt;&lt;!-- Published by JAX-WS RI (http://jax-ws.java.net). RI&apos;s version is JAX-WS RI 2.3.0-wls122140-b190328.0053 svn-revision#unknown. --&gt;&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:ns0=&quot;http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;anyTypeArray&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;item&quot; type=&quot;xsd:anyType&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; nillable=&quot;true&quot;/&gt;&lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
      </void> 
     </object> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>http://temenos.com/CPBAPI</string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add">

type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;criteriaValue&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;operand&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;Status&quot;&gt;&lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;transactionId&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;messageId&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;&lt;xsd:element name=&quot;successIndicator&quot;   <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Envelope</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/&quot; xmlns:wsp=&quot;http://www.w3.org/ns/ws-policy&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot; xmlns:wsp1_2=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy&quot; xmlns:wsu=&quot;http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; xmlns:soap=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/&quot; xmlns:wsam=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata&quot; xmlns:ftns=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI/WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK/Output&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI/WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK/Output&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPI&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Envelope&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;ftns:Header&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;ftns:Body&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Header&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Body&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;tns:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://temenos.com/CPBAPI/WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK/Output</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></OutputRecordDefinition>
    <FaultRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Error</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot; ?&gt;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot; xmlns:soapenv=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/&quot;&gt;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/&quot;/&gt;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Error&quot;&gt;
       &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;
          &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorCode&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorMessage&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorDetail&quot; type=&quot;tns:errorDetail&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;data&quot; type=&quot;tns:data&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
          &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
       &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;errorDetail&quot;&gt;
	  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;soapenv:Fault&quot;/&gt;
          &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;data&quot;&gt;
	  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
         &lt;xsd:any namespace=&quot;##any&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; processContents=&quot;lax&quot;/&gt;
      &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></FaultRecordDefinition>
</ESBAdapterConfigurations>
</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java>
